mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t.name FROM scenic_spot_tag st INNER JOIN tag t ON t.id = st.tag_id WHERE st.scenic_spot_id = #{scenicSpotId} AND t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.name IS NOT NULL AND t.name <> '' ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC, t.id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO scenic_spot_tag (scenic_spot_id, tag_id, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.scenicSpotId}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.createTime})
